title: cern
description: ONLY optimizations, nothing to decrease fps
body:
everyone else complains about getting only 100 fps but us, the ones struggling to get 60, are the ones who really need it. that's who this is made for.

i've tried to collect every mod that claims to optimize the game, even if they might not be super compatible. there is no extra fluff or features like capes or mods which add optifine features. it is completely bare.

it doubled my FPS while decreasing gpu and memory.

![A screenshot with the pack showing 109 FPS, 69% GPU usage, and 41% Memory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d62081b7f55c7aa2b6e90f798623bb9fb623922.jpeg)

![A screenshot without the pack showing 58 FPS, 100% GPU Usage and 71% Memory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/160a33e311822ecdb2ba39e836f03b1119dc7d5b.jpeg)
